mapper.select:
SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(f.feedback_time, '%Y-%m') AS date,
CONCAT(YEAR(f.feedback_time), '-Q', QUARTER(f.feedback_time)) AS date,
DATE_FORMAT(f.feedback_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date,
ROUND(AVG(f.aqi_value), 1) AS avgAqi, MAX(f.aqi_value) AS maxAqi, MIN(f.aqi_value) AS minAqi, COUNT(*) AS count FROM feedback f
AND f.feedback_time >= #{startDate}
AND f.feedback_time <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
AND f.grid_address IN ( SELECT gm.grid_address FROM grid_member gm WHERE gm.city_id = #{cityId} )
AND f.grid_address IN ( SELECT gm.grid_address FROM grid_member gm INNER JOIN city c ON gm.city_id = c.id WHERE c.province_id = #{provinceId} )
GROUP BY date ORDER BY date

SELECT p.province_name AS provinceName, p.province_code AS provinceCode, SUM(CASE WHEN f.pm25 > 75 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pm25OverCount, SUM(CASE WHEN f.so2 > 150 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS so2OverCount, SUM(CASE WHEN f.co > 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS coOverCount, COUNT(f.id) AS totalCount FROM province p LEFT JOIN city c ON c.province_id = p.id LEFT JOIN grid_member gm ON gm.city_id = c.id LEFT JOIN feedback f ON f.grid_address = gm.grid_address GROUP BY p.id, p.province_name, p.province_code ORDER BY pm25OverCount DESC

SELECT al.level, al.description, al.color, COUNT(f.id) AS count FROM aqi_level al LEFT JOIN feedback f ON f.aqi_value BETWEEN al.aqi_min AND al.aqi_max GROUP BY al.id, al.level, al.description, al.color ORDER BY al.id

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(f.feedback_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, ROUND(AVG(f.aqi_value), 1) AS avgAqi, MAX(f.aqi_value) AS maxAqi, MIN(f.aqi_value) AS minAqi, COUNT(f.id) AS totalCount FROM feedback f WHERE f.feedback_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
